title: centaurea × villaris
intro: Centaurea × villaris, also known as a hybrid of the Centaurea species, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain, and fighting infections. The health benefits of Centaurea × villaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote skin health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × villaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
